titleStmt.title: SII 24.485: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 485. (A.R. No. 354 of 1953-54.) SHRINE OF THE GODDESS RAṄGANĀYAKĪ, TIERS, NORTH WALL.

summary.p: Records a poliyūṭṭu grant of the income on certain lands in Vaḍavūr alias Śrīraṅgarājapuram, a brahmadēya in Uṟaiyūrkūṟṟam bought over from Ayyakki Nārāyaṇa-Iraṅgappaṉ and made over to Kōyil-Kandāḍai Aṇṇaṉ by Sūrasārai Śiṟṟāṉ Emberumānārdāsaṉ for conducting some specified service in the name of Kandāḍai Aṇṇaṉ in the temple of the goddess during the aṅkurārpaṇa on the occasion of the festivals named after Aḷiyarāmarāja-Uḍaiyar, Kṛishṇadēva-mahārāyar, Ādi-Brahma, Viruppaṇa-Uḍaiyar and Jaggarāja-Rāmarāja, in the temple. The details of the date viz. Śaka 1488, Kshaya, Vṛishabha, ba. 11, Wednesday, Rēvati correspond regularly to 1566 A.D., May 15, Wednesday, ·53; ·62.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svastiśrī śakābdam 1000 4 100 8 10 8 Itaṉmel cellāniṉṟa kṣayasamvatsarattu vṛṣabhanāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu tiruekādaśiyum budha- vāramum peṟṟa revati nakṣatrattu nāḷ teṉkarai pāṇṭikulapati vaḷaṉāṭṭu viḻāvaṟāvitivaḷanāṭṭut tiruvaraṅkaṉ tiruppati perumāḷ śrīraṅganāthadevar śrīpaṇṭārañcakku cāttiṉa śrīvayiṣṇavarkaḷil koyil kantāṭai Aṇṇaṉ śrīpātat til haritagotrattu Āpastambasūtrattu surasārai ciṟṟāṉ Emperumāṉā dāsaṉeṉ daṇṭaṉ samarppittup poliyūṭṭu śilāśāsanam paṇṇikkuṭuttapaṭi perumāḷ śrīraṅganāthadevarkku naṭakkiṟa Aḷiya rāmarājā- viṉ tirunāḷ 1¥ pūpati Uṭaiyar
tirunāḷ 1� kiṣṇadevamahārāyar tirunāḷ 1� Ātibrahmāviṉ tirunāḷ 1� viruppaṇa Uṭaiyar tirunāḷ 1¥ calakkarācarāmarācāviṉ tirunāḷ 1 Āka tirunāḷ 6-kku varuṣam varuṣam toṟum Aṅkurārppaṇakkaṭṭaḷaikku nācciyār śrīraṅganāyakiyār koyilil seṉaimutaliyār Eḻuntaruḷukiṟa potu Aṇṇaṉ kaiṅkariyamāka nācciyār śrīraṅganāyakiyār Amutu ceytaruḷum tocaippaṭi 2-kku varuṣam 2-kku tirunāḷ 1-kku U 8 Āka varuṣam 1-kku tirunāḷ 6-kku poṉ 4 U 8 Intap poṉ nālum paṇam Eṭṭukkum teṉkarai rājagambhīra vaḷanāṭṭu tiruccirāppaḷḷi Ucāvaṭi Uṟaiyūr kūṟṟattu 1000 9 brahmadeśattu vaṭavūrāṉa śrīraṅgarāja
puratta Ayyakki nārāyaṇaṉ Iraṅkappaṉ kaiyil koṇṭu cetta melaiccāmai kaṇṭa vṛttikkaraiyāṉa Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷaṉ cey (1/2) yum kiḻc cey(1/2) Itaṉ Aṭutta kiḻaicceykku Aṭutta kiḻakku kaḷlappirāṉa cey (1/2) yum Uḷḷūr perumāḷuṭaiya veḷḷaricceykku Aṭutta veḷḷaric cey (1/2) yum Ākac cey 2-kku bhāgam 2¥ malai This space is covered up with cement plaster.Inta bhāgam 2-kku varuṣam 1-kku Irekaippaṭi poṉ 10000-kku U 1-kku pon_ 2 100 vippaṭi poṉ 5 Intap poṉ Añcukkum Inta bhāgam Iraṇṭukkum maṉai 2-kkum varum nañcey puñcey nattam ceyttalait tiṭar manṟum Eppeṟ paṭṭa sakalasamudāyaprāptikaḷum Uḷpaṭa śrīpaṇṭārattile
tiruviṭaiyāṭṭamāka Aṉubhavittukkoṇṭu Inta bhāgattil Utaiyam koṇṭe Intap poliyūṭṭuk kaṭṭaḷai candrādityavaraiyum naṭakkak kaṭavatākavum Inta vakait tiruppaṇiyāramum Itukku varum viṭṭavaṉ viḻukkāṭu Uṇṭāṉatum sannadhiyile viniyogam paṇṇak kaṭavatākavum . dānapālanayormmadhye⎯⎯Cement plastered. The space seems to be left un-engraved as the verse continues. dānāt śreyonupālanam . dānāt svargamavāpnoti pālanādaccutam padam . Inta śilāśāsanam Eḻutiṉamaikku koyil kaṇakku śrīraṅganārāyaṇapriyan Eḻuttu . § .
Digital edition of SII 24.485 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
